allow: PowerShell(cargo test --test zzz_capture 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|test result|panicked" | Select-Object -First 20; Write-Output "===== COUNTS ====="; Get-Content target/tmp/four.count, target/tmp/five.count, target/tmp/six.count, target/tmp/three.count | ForEach-Object { $_ })
PowerShell($results = @\(\); 1..4 | ForEach-Object { $out = cargo test --test six 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test result: \(ok|FAILED\)|diverged"; $results += "run $_`: $out" }; $results)
PowerShell(1..3 | ForEach-Object { "===== suite run $_ ====="; cargo test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test \(three|four|five|six\) \\.\\.\\.|test result: \(ok|FAILED\)|diverged|left:|right:" })

PowerShell($counts = @\(\); 1..6 | ForEach-Object { cargo test --test zzz_capture 2>&1 | Out-Null; $c = "four=$\(Get-Content target/tmp/four.count\) five=$\(Get-Content target/tmp/five.count\) six=$\(Get-Content target/tmp/six.count\) three=$\(Get-Content target/tmp/three.count\)"; $counts += "run $_`: $c" }; $counts; Write-Output "--- distinct count-tuples ---"; \($counts | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split ': '\)[1] } | Sort-Object -Unique\))
PowerShell(1..5 | ForEach-Object { $r = cargo test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test \(three|four|five|six\) \\.\\.\\. \(ok|FAILED\)|diverged|left:|right:"; "===== run $_ ====="; $r })

PowerShell(cargo build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|warning" | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Output "===== TEST RUNS ====="; 1..4 | ForEach-Object { $r = cargo test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test result: \(ok|FAILED\)|diverged|panicked"; "run $_`: $\(\($r | Where-Object { $_ -match 'FAILED|diverged|panicked' }\).Count\) failures" }; Write-Output "===== GIT STATUS ====="; git status --short)

PowerShell($out = cargo test 2>&1; $out | Select-String -Pattern "test \(three|four|five|six\) \\.\\.\\." ; Write-Output "--- aggregate ---"; \($out | Select-String -CaseSensitive -Pattern "FAILED"\).Count.ToString\(\) + " FAILED lines"; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "; \(\\d+\) passed" | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\).Trim\(\) }\))
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'which riscv64-unknown-elf-as riscv64-linux-gnu-as as 2>/dev/null; qemu-system-riscv64 --version 2>/dev/null | head -1')
